g.text: Single machine · pluggable LLM backend (API or local) · no UI
pick best candidate from prefix shortlist + Arabic
API · fast · low cost per call
full HS inference · GRI rules · ~2.5% of rows
API mode: requires network · per-token cost · highest accuracy | Local mode: fully offline · no cost · GPU recommended for Reasoner
Switch via config: LLM_BACKEND=api or LLM_BACKEND=local · both use same HSReasoner interface
